overview: Chandigarh University (CU), located in Mohali, Punjab, is a leading private multidisciplinary university recognized for its industry-oriented curriculum, strong global collaborations, and record-breaking placement sessions across engineering, management, pharmacy, and other professional programs.

placements.medianSalary: CSE/IT: ₹8.00 LPA; ECE/EE: ₹6.25 LPA; Mechanical/Civil: ₹4.00 LPA
placements.placementRate: Consistently high placement rate with over 10,000 students placed in the 2025 cycle.
placements.internationalOffers: Multiple international offers including packages up to ₹1.70 Crore per annum.

admissions.admissionProcess: Admissions are based on entrance exams, merit scores, and counseling depending on the course. Scholarships are available through CUCET and merit-based schemes.
admissions.importantDates: Admission timelines generally follow the annual CU admission cycle and CUCET examination schedule.

campus.area: Large modern residential campus in Mohali, Punjab.
campus.specialNote: Hostel and mess charges vary by room type. Annual hostel fees range from ₹1.06 Lakhs to ₹2.10 Lakhs depending on occupancy and AC/non-AC facilities.

scholarships.CUCETScholarship: Up to 100% tuition fee waiver based on CUCET scores.
scholarships.meritScholarship: Scholarships based on Class 12 performance (e.g., ₹35,000 for above 90% aggregate).

feesAndCharges.annualIncreaseNote: Annual fees may increase by ₹2,000–₹4,000 due to inflation and operational costs.

contact.address: Chandigarh University, NH-05 Chandigarh-Ludhiana Highway, Mohali, Punjab 140413, India
